config.scxml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<scxml xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/07/scxml" xmlns:editor="http://vscxml.com/editor" version="1.0" datamodel="ecmascript" initial="operational" name="HamiltonSTAR_WashStation">
  <datamodel>
    <data id="station_number" expr="1"/>
    <data id="fluid_ok" expr="true"/>
    <data id="wash_cycles_remaining" expr="0"/>
    <data id="last_error" expr="0"/>
  </datamodel>
  <state id="operational" initial="not_initialized" editor:x="100" editor:y="150" editor:width="300" editor:height="250" editor:label="operational" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="0">
    <state id="not_initialized" editor:x="110" editor:y="140" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="not_initialized" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="1">
      <transition target="idle_ws" event="C0WI" editor:id="t_01KP3PWBKN8CJ302KCWAE6PNSG">
        <log expr="'Init wash station'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="idle_ws" editor:x="110" editor:y="260" editor:width="125" editor:height="75" editor:label="idle_ws" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="2">
      <transition target="washing_ws" event="C0WS" editor:id="t_01KP3PWBKNGE4854VNZ0VFKQFG">
        <log expr="'Start wash (G3)'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="washing_ws" event="C0WC" editor:id="t_01KP3PWBKNVJPSTT5DZGYEHVDM">
        <log expr="'Start wash (CR)'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="waiting_ws" event="C0WW" editor:id="t_01KP3PWBKN6935M4ETK8AYSHPE">
        <log expr="'Wait for wash'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="washing_ws" event="C0WR" editor:id="t_01KP3PWBKN6JF59M4Y5WF095E1">
        <log expr="'Repeat wash'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="idle_ws" event="C0QF" editor:id="t_01KP3PWBKNQPWMAVN8W46AWQ9K">
        <log expr="'Query fluid status'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="washing_ws" editor:x="110" editor:y="380" editor:width="125" editor:height="75" editor:label="washing_ws" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="3">
      <transition target="idle_ws" event="wash_ws.done" editor:id="t_01KP3PWBKN4XK62KWQGZM90B2P">
        <log expr="'Wash complete'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="error_ws" event="wash_ws.error" editor:id="t_01KP3PWBKNEKBSPWX0MYSJCE60">
        <assign location="last_error" expr="18"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="waiting_ws" editor:x="110" editor:y="500" editor:width="125" editor:height="75" editor:label="waiting_ws" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="4">
      <transition target="idle_ws" event="wait_ws.done" editor:id="t_01KP3PWBKNPHYQSRAR946TW68Q"/>
    </state>
    <state id="error_ws" editor:x="110" editor:y="620" editor:width="125" editor:height="75" editor:label="error_ws" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="5">
      <onentry>
        <log expr="'Wash error ' + last_error" label="ERROR"/>
      </onentry>
      <transition target="not_initialized" event="C0WI" editor:id="t_01KP3PWBKNQ58KEZM9TJ828Z26">
        <assign location="last_error" expr="0"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
  </state>
</scxml>
